reviews.comment:
Un lugar de buena asistencia. Solamente pare de paso.

(Translated by Google)
A place with good service. Just stop by while you're passing through.

reviews.comment:
Baños chicos a veces no hay agua y solo se puede pagar en efectivo!!

(Translated by Google)
Small bathrooms, sometimes no water, and you can only pay in cash!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBNjRfeklnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy frio en invierno peligro de hielo sobre calzada. Este pueblo cuenta con ypf del automóvil club.

(Translated by Google)
Very cold in winter, danger of ice on the road. This town has a YPF service station and an automobile club.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNneV9tYl9RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pasar y no probar el sandwich de crudo con manteca, es una falta grave.

(Translated by Google)
Passing by and not trying the raw beef sandwich with butter is a serious offense.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRbjl5UnlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Se aprovechan estar en el medio de la nada, sólo aceptan efectivo para cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
They take advantage of being in the middle of nowhere, only accepting cash for fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBemRITUxREAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre pasamos por los tradicionales sanwiches de jamon crudo y queso.

(Translated by Google)
We always stop by for the traditional prosciutto and cheese sandwiches.
